value.stringValue: View and add a Job filter
Type the name of the job eg. Chef, Driver, Cleaner etc.
Use the box below to search for and add a Job Preference:

fields.name: Display_0
fields.fieldText:
Recommended Preferences

Below are some recommended jobs based on your current preferences.

﻿﻿(Tap on any of the records below to add)

fields.name: JobPreferences
fields.fieldText:
My Current Job Preferences

These are your current Job Preferences.

﻿(Tap on any of the records below to delete)

textTemplates.name: ActionURL
textTemplates.text: Click to Delete
